title: Reproducible differentiation and characterization of neurons from mouse embryonic stem cells
author: Saxena, Choudhury, et al.

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: A. Monitoring differentiation by quantitative real-time PCRs

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: Procedure1.RNA samples were prepared from different cells using the RNeasy kit as per manufacturer's instructions and quantified using NanoDropโ.2.5 ยตg each of the RNA samples were converted to cDNA using Superscript IV cDNA synthesis kit as per manufacturer's instructions.3.~50 ng each of the cDNA samples were then mixed with gene-specific primer mix (0.2 ยตM each) (Tableย 5), 2x SYBR Green mix and PCR grade water to a final volume of 10 ยตl in 0.2 ml PCR tubes.Table 5Oligonucleotide sequences used for real-time PCR analysis.Table 5Gene NameForward PrimerReverse PrimerAnnealing TemperatureSize (bp)BrachyuryGCCAAAGAAAGAAACGACCAATTGTCCGCATAGGTTGGAG60ยฐC264GapdhGAAGGGCTCATGACCACAGTCCTCATACTTGGCAGGTTTCTCCAGGC60ยฐC256Gata6GTGCAATGCATGCGGTCTCTACAGTTCATAGCAAGTGGTCGAGGCACC60ยฐC222GfapCACGAACGAGTCCCTAGAGCATGGTGATGCGGTTTTCTTC60ยฐC234ItgamCTCATGGTCACCTCCTGCTTCAAGCTTGTATAGGCCAGCA60ยฐC406Map2AGCCGCAACGCCAATGGATTTTTGTTCTGAGGCTGGCGAT60ยฐC313MbpCTTCAAAGACAGGCCCTCAGGCTGTCTCTTCCTCCCTTCC60ยฐC213NanogCTGAGCTATAAGCAGGTTAAGACCTGCTGAGCCCTTCTGAATC60ยฐC114NestinGAAGTGGCTACATACAGGACTCGGTCAGGAAAGCCAAGAGAA60ยฐC94Oct4CTCCCGAGGAGTCCCAGGACATGAGAACCTTCAGGAGATATGCAAATCGG60ยฐC179Pax6AACGCGAGGAAGATGTGTCTGGTACGTCTGTGTGCCTGAC60ยฐC303ฮฒ III TubulinTCAGCGATGAGCACGGCATACACTCTTTCCGCACGACATC60ยฐC3014.The reactions were used for real-time PCR analyses (PCR conditions: 1 cycle of 95ยฐC: 2 min; 40 cycles of 95ยฐC: 30 sec, 60ยฐC: 30 sec, 72ยฐC: 30 sec; 1 cycle of 72ยฐC: 1 min). Gapdh was used as endogenous reference control and fold-changes were calculated by the 2โฮฮCt method [10].

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: All the experiments were done with at least three biological and two technical replicates. The expression levels of the different transcripts from EBs and neurons were compared with those from ESCs by the student's two-tailed t-test and p <0.05 was taken as statistically significant.
